sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Edison International announces mixed Q1 results, earnings guidance reaffirmed By Investing.com
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) reported mixed first-quarter 2026 results, with adjusted earnings per share of $1.42 falling short of analyst estimates, but revenue exceeding expectations at $4.1 billion. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 core EPS guidance in the range of $5.90-$6.20, which has a midpoint below the analyst consensus. Southern California Edison's core EPS increased year-over-year due to the adoption of the 2025 General Rate Case final decision.

feed.title: F5 Reports Second Quarter Results with 11% Revenue Growth
feed.summary: F5, Inc. announced strong financial results for its second quarter fiscal year 2026, with total revenue growing 11% year-over-year to $812 million, driven by a 22% increase in product revenue. The company raised its fiscal year 2026 revenue guidance to a range of 7% to 8% growth and non-GAAP EPS to $16.25-$16.55, reflecting sustained demand for its solutions amidst growing hybrid multicloud adoption, an expanding cybersecurity threat landscape, and AI inference. F5 is positioned to help customers scale and secure future AI-powered applications.

feed.title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Boosts Deconversion Revenue Forecast for Fisca
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates Inc (JKHY) announced a boost in its deconversion revenue forecast for fiscal year 2026 to $37 million, following a strong Q3 performance where it reached $18.7 million. The company, a key player in financial technology for U.S. banks and credit unions, shows strong financial health with a GF Score™ of 93/100, and its stock appears undervalued based on its P/E ratio. However, recent insider selling activity warrants investor caution.

feed.title: International Paper Co (IP) Shares Surge 4.2% -- What GF Score o
feed.summary: International Paper Co (IP) shares rose 4.2% to $34.02, but are down significantly year-to-date and over the past year. Despite this, the stock is considered modestly undervalued by GuruFocus' GF Value™ and shows strong insider buying activity. Its GF Score™ of 71 indicates above-average fundamental strength, though growth and financial strength show some limitations.

feed.title: Travelers takes Peerless to court over Queens construction injury tender
feed.summary: Travelers Property Casualty Company of America has filed a federal lawsuit against Peerless Insurance Company, alleging Peerless is refusing to cover defense costs for a construction injury in Queens. The dispute centers on a 2015 incident where a worker was injured by falling glass at a high-rise project. Travelers claims deposition testimony proves the injured worker's employer, an All Island Masonry subcontractor, was responsible, triggering Peerless's additional insured endorsements.

feed.title: SunCar Technology Reports Financial Results for Full Year 2025
feed.summary: SunCar Technology Group Inc. reported a transformational year in 2025, achieving record annual revenue of $489 million and profitability in the second half of the year, with Q4 revenue up 17% year-over-year. The company highlighted its strategic AI partnership with ByteDance, which is enhancing AI-centric auto insurance and services, and expanded collaborations with major EV companies like Tesla, Xiaomi, and NIO. SunCar also secured significant contracts in its auto services segment, including an estimated $50 million concierge chauffeur contract with Agricultural Bank of China.

feed.title: After a ByteDance AI deal, SunCar turned profitable in late 2025
feed.summary: SunCar Technology reported record 2025 revenue of $489.3 million, achieving profitability in Q3 and Q4, with net profits of $1.4M and $1.7M respectively. The company also announced a strategic AI partnership with ByteDance, which significantly boosted insurance sales growth for its partners, and maintained its 2026 revenue forecast at $600 million. Despite a full-year net loss of $2.4 million, this was a substantial reduction from the previous year, primarily due to decreased share-based compensation expenses.

feed.title: ONEOK boosts 2026 outlook after strong first quarter
feed.summary: ONEOK (OKE) reported a strong first quarter in 2026, with net income and adjusted EBITDA increasing by double digits due to higher system volumes and optimization activities. The company subsequently raised its 2026 guidance for net income and adjusted EBITDA, while maintaining capital expenditure plans, citing improved market conditions and regional volume gains. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates OKE as an Outperform, highlighting solid financial performance and supportive technicals.

feed.title: Is ONEOK (OKE) Undervalued After Q1 2026? EPS $1.23 (miss vs $1.31 est), Revenue $9,618M (beat vs $8,234.49M est) -- GF Score 86/100; GF Value: 8.6% undervalued
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. (OKE) reported Q1 2026 results with net income up 12% to $776 million and diluted EPS of $1.23, missing estimates but delivering total revenues of $9,618 million, which beat expectations. The company saw strong volume growth across its core systems, leading to a 13% rise in Adjusted EBITDA, and subsequently raised its 2026 financial guidance. GuruFocus assesses OKE as 8.6% undervalued with a strong GF Score of 86/100, citing solid operating quality despite balance sheet considerations typical of capital-intensive industries.

feed.title: FS KKR Capital Reschedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: FS KKR Capital (FSK) has rescheduled its first-quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call to Monday, May 11, 2026, due to a scheduling conflict. The company, a business development company focusing on credit solutions for private U.S. middle market companies, clarified that this change does not indicate any alteration to its underlying operations or strategy. Analysts currently rate FSK as a "Hold" with a $11.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark assesses it as "Neutral" due to mixed financial performance and a reduced dividend outlook despite supportive valuation.

feed.title: Ronald Wayne's $800 Apple Exit: The Astronomical Cost Of Walking Away From A $4 Trillion Giant
feed.summary: The article delves into Ronald Wayne's decision to sell his 10% stake in Apple for $800 shortly after co-founding it, examining the "untold risk" that led to his exit, primarily concerns about unlimited personal liability for a startup. It also discusses Apple's current market position, its upcoming earnings report, and the leadership transition with John Ternus succeeding Tim Cook.

feed.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Robinhood, Booking Holdings, Starbucks, Visa & more
feed.summary: This article details the after-hours stock performance of several major companies following their first-quarter earnings reports and updated guidance. Notable movers include Booking Holdings, whose shares fell due to lowered full-year earnings guidance, while Starbucks and Visa saw increases after surpassing expectations and raising forecasts. Other companies like Robinhood, Mondelez, Enphase Energy, Seagate Technology, NXP Semiconductors, F5, CoStar Group, O-I Glass, Rush Street Interactive, Bloom Energy, and Brown-Forman also experienced significant stock movements based on their financial results and corporate announcements.

feed.title: Is It Time To Rethink Sempra (SRE) After A 26% One Year Share Price Gain?
feed.summary: Sempra (SRE) has seen a 26% share price gain over the past year, closing recently at US$92.46. Despite this performance and positive momentum in the utilities sector, Simply Wall St's valuation checks score Sempra at 0 out of 6, with both Discounted Cash Flow and Price-to-Earnings analyses suggesting the stock is significantly overvalued. Investors are encouraged to consider a "Narratives" approach to valuation, allowing for personalized assumptions about future revenue, earnings, and margins.

feed.title: Northern Trust Insider Sold Shares Worth $462,056, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: A recent SEC filing revealed that an insider at Northern Trust sold 5,888 shares of the company's common stock, valued at $462,056. This transaction comes amidst a mixed performance for Northern Trust's shares in early trading, and several analysts have recently adjusted their price targets and ratings on the stock.

feed.title: Lululemon (LULU) Urges Shareholders to Support Current Board Amid Proxy Battle
feed.summary: Lululemon is urging its shareholders to support the current board members against nominees proposed by founder Chip Wilson, who cites a 62% share value decline. Despite the ongoing board dispute, Lululemon has a strong GF Score™ of 83/100, high profitability and growth, and a P/E ratio that suggests the stock may be undervalued relative to historical norms. Insider buying activity also indicates confidence in the company's future performance.

feed.title: Form 144: Proposed VRSN affiliate sales include restricted stock, 2,884 performance shares (NASDAQ: VRSN)
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for Verisign (NASDAQ: VRSN) details proposed sales of Common stock by an affiliate through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC Executive Financial Services. The filing indicates a total of 5,000 shares with an aggregate market value of $1,355,106.50 are to be sold, alongside 91,000,000 outstanding shares. The schedule specifies various restricted stock grants from 2024–2025 and 2,884 performance shares dated February 13, 2025.

feed.title: Prologis declares quarterly dividend of $1.07 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.07 per share of common stock, payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record by June 16, 2026. This marks the 12th consecutive year the company has raised its dividend. Despite trading near its 52-week high, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: ONEOK raises 2026 profit forecast after higher volumes power quarterly beat
feed.summary: U.S. pipeline operator ONEOK raised its 2026 profit and adjusted EBITDA forecasts after exceeding first-quarter core profit estimates. The improved outlook is attributed to increased volumes across its natural gas liquids, gas processing, and pipeline systems, benefiting from strong production in shale basins and growing natural gas demand. ONEOK CEO Pierce Norton noted strong performance across multiple business segments and a constructive market environment.

feed.title: Coca-Cola sales are climbing — and 'shrinkflation' is the sly way it's keeping fans buying more
feed.summary: Coca-Cola reported increased sales despite rising costs and "shrinkflation," where products are sold in smaller capacities at similar prices. The company's chief pointed to the strategy of selling slightly smaller bottles and cans as a key factor in their continued success. This mirrors a broader trend of "shrinkflation" impacting other consumer goods like Chick-fil-A sandwiches and Costco cookies.

feed.title: Texas Instruments sr. VP Bahai sells $982k in stock
feed.summary: Ahmad Bahai, Senior Vice President at Texas Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ:TXN), sold 3,660 shares of common stock for approximately $982,359 after exercising an equal number of stock options. This transaction follows a 71% surge in the company's shares over the past year, though an InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued. Bahai now directly holds 42,519 shares of Texas Instruments common stock, amidst positive analyst sentiment and raised price targets for the company due to strong financial performance.

feed.title: Lamb Weston CFO James Gray buys $199,780 in company stock
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc.'s CFO, James D. Gray, recently purchased 4,556 shares of company stock for $199,780. This acquisition increases his direct holdings to 59,741 shares, occurring as the stock trades near $43.08, down significantly over the past six months and assessed as overvalued by InvestingPro. Analysts have provided mixed outlooks for Lamb Weston, adjusting price targets while maintaining varying ratings, reflecting cautious optimism amid international challenges and strong North American growth.

feed.title: Veralto jumps after Q1 results and higher full-year EPS outlook
feed.summary: Veralto Corporation (VLTO) saw a 4.4% stock increase following its first-quarter 2026 earnings report, which showcased solid year-over-year growth and an elevated full-year adjusted EPS outlook. The company reported sales of $1.422 billion and raised its 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance, alongside plans for a new cost optimization program and share repurchases. Insider trading showed sales by executives, while institutional investors had mixed activity, and analysts issued positive ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Nucor sees strong demand, record shipments, and higher prices as 2026 builds momentum
feed.summary: Nucor reported record quarterly steel mill shipments and increased backlogs, driven by strong nonresidential construction demand, particularly in data centers and energy. The company expects continued growth and higher pricing in 2026 due to robust fundamentals and reduced import pressure from trade policies. Nucor also highlighted significant capital investments in new facilities and upgrades, projecting stronger financial results as these projects come online.

feed.title: Energy Transfer (NYSE:ET) Trading 1.9% Higher After Dividend Announcement
feed.summary: Energy Transfer (NYSE:ET) saw its stock price rise by 1.9% following an announcement of an increased quarterly distribution of $0.3375 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $1.35 and a 7.0% yield, despite a high payout ratio of 110.74%. Trading volume increased significantly by 48%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $21.60, though Q1 EPS missed estimates while revenue exceeded expectations.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Stock Slides On Mixed Q1 Earnings Despite New Data Center Plans
feed.summary: Enphase Energy reported mixed first-quarter earnings, with revenue missing estimates but adjusted earnings surpassing expectations. The company also announced plans to develop a 1.25 MW IQ Solid-State Transformer product for data centers, designed to provide 800 V DC output for next-generation AI racks. Despite the forward-looking AI rack initiative, Enphase shares experienced a post-market decline.

feed.title: Ventas Ups 2026 Investment Guidance to $3B as Buying Remains More Attractive Than Building
feed.summary: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) has increased its expected investment volume for 2026 to $3 billion, driven by a flurry of acquisition activity in the senior housing market. The company has completed $1.7 billion in senior housing investments this year, including a $540 million acquisition of Revel Communities’ 11-community luxury senior living platform. CEO Debra Cafaro highlighted that buying remains more attractive than building due to current construction, deal, and lending conditions, leading to a significant increase in their acquisition pipeline.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment reports growth in regional properties, big gains in digital segment
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment reported slight year-over-year increases in revenue and adjusted earnings, primarily driven by a significant 61% growth in its digital segment. The company saw its digital revenue reach a record $374 million, contributing to a consolidated adjusted EBITDA of $887 million. Regional properties also showed a 3% revenue increase, although Las Vegas segment earnings slightly declined.

feed.title: Danaher (NYSE: DHR) director awarded new phantom share units
feed.summary: Danaher director Elias A. Zerhouni was granted 259.718 phantom shares as part of his deferred board compensation. These shares, valued at $177.25 each, are fully vested and will convert to Danaher common stock on a one-for-one basis upon distribution. Following this transaction, Zerhouni now holds a total of 18,472.282 phantom shares under the Non-Employee Directors Deferred Compensation Plan.

feed.title: Danaher (NYSE: DHR) director defers fees into 17.248 phantom share units
feed.summary: Danaher director Teri List received 17.248 phantom shares as part of the company's non-employee director deferred compensation plan, based on Danaher's closing stock price of $177.25. This grant increases her total holdings to 7,660.399 phantom shares, which convert to common stock on a one-for-one basis upon distribution. The director is fully vested in all deferred amounts under the plan.

feed.title: PROLOGIS DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) has declared a regular cash dividend for the quarter ending June 30, 2026. This includes a dividend of $1.07 per share for common stock and $1.0675 per share for the 8.54% Series Q Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, both payable on June 30, 2026, to stockholders of record on June 16, 2026. The company also provided forward-looking statements regarding its operations and financial performance.

feed.title: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
feed.summary: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) reported its Q1 CY2026 earnings, missing Wall Street's revenue expectations with $6.23 billion, despite a 3.5% year-on-year sales increase. However, the company beat non-GAAP profit estimates, reporting $1.81 per share, 4% above consensus. The CEO highlighted strong earnings and cash flow, attributing it to the team's strength and the business model's resilience, while the stock remained flat after the announcement.

feed.title: Texas Instruments’ SVP Kane sells $1.66m in company shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Katharine Kane, SVP and General Counsel at Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN), sold 6,125 shares for approximately $1.66 million after acquiring an equal number of shares through stock option exercises. The sales occurred amidst a 71% surge in TXN shares over the past year, with InvestingPro indicating the stock is currently overvalued but showing strong momentum. This transaction follows positive analyst sentiment and raised price targets for Texas Instruments due to strong performance in industrial and data center segments.

feed.title: U.S. Stocks - Dow Inc. continues to decline, down 26 dollars, amid cautious trading over the Middle East and AI (as of the 28th).
feed.summary: Dow Inc. stock experienced a decline of $26 as of the 28th, reflecting a broader cautious trading sentiment in the U.S. stock market. This cautiousness is attributed to ongoing concerns related to the Middle East and uncertainties surrounding artificial intelligence.

feed.title: [ARS] Guardant Health, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Guardant Health, Inc. (GH) has filed an ARS form with the SEC on April 28, 2026, at 04:49 PM. The filing is available as a PDF document on the SEC EDGAR database. The company's latest news includes upcoming financial results, advancements in precision medicine, and expanded utility of multiomic testing.

feed.title: Enphase Energy: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Enphase Energy Inc. reported a first-quarter loss of $7.4 million, or 6 cents per share, which adjusted to 47 cents per share, surpassing analyst expectations. However, the solar technology company's revenue of $282.9 million missed Street forecasts. For the current quarter, Enphase Energy anticipates revenue between $280 million and $310 million.

feed.title: Franklin Street: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Franklin Street Properties Corp. (FSP) reported its first-quarter financial results, including funds from operations (FFO) of $1.2 million, or 1 cent per share. The real estate investment trust also posted a net loss of $9.5 million, or 9 cents per share, on revenue of $26.2 million for the period.

feed.title: Walmart earmarks millions for multiple Arizona store upgrades
feed.summary: Walmart plans to invest billions nationwide, including renovating nearly 20 stores across Arizona this year. These upgrades aim to modernize the in-store and digital shopping experiences for customers. The retail giant's renovations will feature enhanced product displays, among other improvements.

feed.title: Enphase Energy falls 5% as weak demand overshadows Q1 beat
feed.summary: Enphase Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) reported first-quarter results that surpassed Wall Street expectations with adjusted EPS of $0.47 and revenue of $282.9 million, exceeding estimates of $0.44 and $281.89 million respectively. Despite the beat, shares dropped 5.5% after hours due to a 20.6% year-over-year revenue decline, driven by weak U.S. demand following the expiration of the federal residential clean energy tax credit and seasonality. The company guided Q2 revenue in line with consensus estimates while noting a significant increase in European revenue.

feed.title: [Form 4] CONSTELLATION BRANDS, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Jeffrey H. LaBarge, EVP, CLO & Secretary of Constellation Brands, Inc. (STZ), reported an acquisition of 4,808 restricted stock units on April 24, 2026. These units represent a contingent right to receive Class A Common Stock and will vest in three equal annual installments starting May 1, 2027. Following this transaction, LaBarge directly holds 4,808 restricted stock units.

feed.title: F5, Inc. (FFIV) Appoints Anand Eswaran to Board of Directors
feed.summary: F5, Inc. (FFIV) has appointed Anand Eswaran to its Board of Directors, effective April 24, 2026. Eswaran will serve on the Board’s Audit and Talent and Compensation Committees, receiving customary non-employee director compensation including an annual retainer and a restricted stock unit grant. This appointment aims to strengthen the company's governance and leadership team.

feed.title: Fulgent Genetics (FLGT) CFO has 2,747 shares withheld for RSU taxes
feed.summary: Fulgent Genetics' CFO and Treasurer, Paul Kim, had 2,747 shares of common stock withheld on April 26, 2026, to cover tax obligations arising from the vesting of restricted stock units. This was a routine tax-related disposition, not an open-market sale, and the shares were valued at $16.31 each. Following this transaction, Kim continues to hold a substantial 365,800 shares of Fulgent common stock.

feed.title: Fulgent Genetics (FLGT) COO reports tax-withholding share disposition after RSU vesting
feed.summary: Jian Xie, President and COO of Fulgent Genetics (FLGT), reported a routine tax-related disposition of 4,361 common shares at $16.31 per share. This withholding was to satisfy tax obligations arising from the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) assumed through a prior merger. Following this transaction, Xie directly holds 370,952 common shares, with an additional 220,816 shares held indirectly by The Hsieh Family Dynasty Trust.

feed.title: Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ) grants 3,526 RSUs to HR chief
feed.summary: Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ) has granted 3,526 restricted stock units (RSUs) to its EVP & Chief HR Officer, Paula Kristine Erickson. These RSUs represent a contingent right to receive Class A Common Stock, vesting in three equal annual installments. This transaction is considered a neutral filing with neutral sentiment, as it reflects equity-based compensation rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: FMC Corporation declares 8-cent quarterly dividend
feed.summary: FMC Corporation has announced that its board of directors declared an 8-cent quarterly dividend per share, payable on July 16, 2026. The agricultural sciences company has maintained dividend payments for 21 consecutive years, with a current dividend yield of 2.06%. While the stock trades at $15.26 with a $1.9 billion market cap, InvestingPro analysis indicates it is undervalued, having dropped 61% over the past year.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Q1 2026 slides: navigating occupancy headwinds
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc. reported mixed Q1 2026 earnings, with a sharp increase in net income due to debt extinguishment gains but declining FFO and occupancy rates, leading to an 11.57% stock drop. The company is implementing an aggressive capital recycling program and portfolio transformation to address operational challenges, focusing on its core Megacampus platform while facing headwinds in rental rates and occupancy. Despite these issues, Alexandria maintains strong liquidity and credit ratings, and its long-term strategy aligns with the growth potential of the life science industry, although investors remain cautious due to near-term operational uncertainties.

feed.title: Genuine Parts declares quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per share
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.0625 per share, payable on July 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 5, 2026. The company, a global service provider of automotive and industrial replacement parts, recently reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, exceeding analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Issues FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) has released its FY 2026 earnings guidance, projecting an EPS of $5.90 to $6.20, which aligns closely with the consensus analyst estimate of $6.11. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $1.42, missing estimates, but revenue exceeded expectations at $4.10 billion. EIX also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.8775.

feed.title: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) Updates Q2 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) has updated its Q2 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS of $0.270–$0.300 and revenue between $922 million and $932 million, surpassing consensus EPS estimates. The company also announced a $1.50 billion share repurchase program, authorizing the buyback of roughly 5.3% of outstanding shares. Despite the positive guidance, shares traded down about 0.8% to $35.95, significantly below the average analyst target price.

feed.title: Public Storage outlines $110M-$130M NSA synergies with $0.35-$0.50 per share earnings upside by 2028-2029
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has projected annual Notional Shareholder Accretion (NSA) synergies of $110 million to $130 million following its acquisition by 2028-2029. This is expected to translate into an earnings upside of $0.35 to $0.50 per share. The company anticipates achieving these synergies through various operational and financial optimizations.

feed.title: PNC economist Stuart Hoffman officially retires after 46 years
feed.summary: After 46 years with PNC Financial Services Group, economist Stuart Hoffman has officially retired. Hoffman was a prominent figure at Pittsburgh's largest bank and was one of its most visible executives throughout his career. His retirement marks the end of a long and distinguished tenure with the institution.
